lineA_mahalanobis_handcrafted_full_clip.role: secondary anomaly monitor / OK distribution distance / drift detector
lineA_mahalanobis_handcrafted_full_clip.preprocessing: mono average, resample 16 kHz, DC removal, original amplitude scale unless clipping correction is needed, full clip handcrafted features

lineB_extratrees_balanced.preprocessing: tolerant WAV read, mono average, resample 16 kHz, DC removal, peak normalization, full clip Line B classical features

source_trace_note: Source Linux paths are documented in ENGINEERING_NOTES.md only; runtime model loading uses relative paths from this package.
